question_text: A student has a mass of 50 kg on Earth. Will their mass be the same, larger, or smaller on the Moon? Explain your answer.
correct_answer: The mass will be the same (50 kg). Mass is the amount of matter in an object and does not change with location.
explanation: Mass is an intrinsic property of an object and remains constant everywhere. Weight changes because it depends on gravitational field strength, but mass does not.
